title: Command palette (Ctrl-K) overlay: jump + switch-view
description: Add the palette view-model (internal/tui/palette.go): Ctrl-K opens a fuzzy overlay focus-zone listing jump targets (ticks/epics/projects by id+title) and switch-view actions (List/Board/Roadmap/Timeline). Palette is a FOCUS STATE, not a registry View. Navigation actions only here (jump, switch view); EDIT actions are added by the editable-detail tick which owns the write-path. Wire via a minimal localized edit to app.go key routing + focus-zone case. Design docs/design/tui-unified-app.md section 8. Files: internal/tui/palette.go (new) + test; localized app.go edit.
acceptance_criteria: unit: palette Update fuzzy-filters candidates, Enter emits jump/switch msg, Esc closes; teatest golden: Ctrl-K, type partial id, Enter jumps List selection + breadcrumb updates
